rights_holder: Edward Steichen (1879–1973). Public domain by age (1903 publication).
attribution: Edward Steichen, photographic portrait of John Pierpont Morgan, 1903. Public domain.
subject: Steichen's celebrated 1903 portrait of J. Pierpont Morgan — one of his earliest masterworks. The hand on the chair-arm photographs as a blade of light, an effect cited in art-history literature as proto-cinematic.
